zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Ursins Orsini於1294年出生在義大利普格利亞特拉 達特朗托索爾托時，他的父親Romano Orsini19歲，母親Anastasia de Monfort19歲。他於1330年與Sveva Del Balzo結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1350年在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ursins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Dante, Domenic, Marco, Philomena, Rocco, Salvatore, Santina, Vito.
Italian (mainly Sicily): patronymic or plural form of   Ursino  .
Italianized form of Slovenian Uršič or Croatian Uršić and Ursić (see Ursic ). Compare Orsi 2.

variants.name: Ursino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Antonio, Benito, Carmelo, Cosimo, Domenico, Francesca, Liborio, Luigi, Marco, Mario, Nicasio, Nicola, Rocco.
Italian (mainly Sicily): from a diminutive of   Urso  .

nameMeanings.name: Orsini
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Armando, Donato, Orlando, Antonio, Mario, Carmine, Nunzio, Pasquale, Vittorio, Camillo, Dante, Domenic.  Spanish Carlos, Domingo, Jose, Santos, Alejandro, Ana, Anacleto.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Orsino  .

variants.name: Orsino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Orlando, Annunziata, Salvatore.
Italian: from a diminutive of the vocabulary word or a pet form of the personal name   Orso  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Ursins Orsini was born in 1294, in Soleto, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italy, his father, Romano Orsini, was 19 and his mother, Anastasia de Monfort, was 19. He married Sveva Del Balzo in 1330. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1350, in Naples, Campania, Italy, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Ursins Orsini est né en 1294, à Soleto, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italie, son père, Romano Orsini, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Anastasia de Monfort, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Sveva Del Balzo en 1330. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1350, à Napoli, Campania, Italie, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Ursins Orsini 1294 in Soleto, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Romano Orsini 19 und seine Mutter Anastasia de Monfort 19. Er hat 1330 Sveva Del Balzo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1350 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Napoli, Campania, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ursins Orsini è nato il nel 1294 nel Soleto, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italia, il suo padre, Romano Orsini, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Anastasia de Monfort, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Sveva Del Balzo nel 1330. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1350, nel Napoli, Campania, Italia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Ursins Orsiniが1294年にイタリアプウグリアテラ ド'オトラントーソレトーで生まれた時，父Romano Orsiniは19歳，母Anastasia de Monfortは19歳であった。1330年にSveva Del Balzoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1350年にイタリアカンプアニアナポリで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Ursins Orsini(이)가 1294년 이탈리아 푸그리야 터라 드'트랜토 솔토에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Romano Orsini(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Anastasia de Monfort(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1330년 Sveva Del Balzo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1350년 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ursins Orsini nasceu em 1294, em Soleto, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Itália, seu pai, Romano Orsini, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Anastasia de Monfort, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Sveva Del Balzo em 1330. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1350, em Napoli, Campania, Itália, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Ursins Orsini родился в 1294 г. в местности солето, тирра д'отранто, пугля, Италия, его отцу по имени Romano Orsini было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Anastasia de Monfort, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Sveva Del Balzo в 1330 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1350 г. в местности наполи, кампаня, Италия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Ursins Orsini nació en 1294, en Soleto, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italia, su papá, Romano Orsini, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Anastasia de Monfort, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sveva Del Balzo en 1330. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1350, en Napoli, Campania, Italia, a la edad de 56 años.
